text: Hello. Hi, this is Chelsea and I'm reaching out because we pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note here showing your 2026 plan update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation from you so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. Just confirm for me. Do you have both part A and part B? I'm sorry, but can you speak English? No. I'm sorry. We currently only have English speaking staff available. Have a good day.
